title: Senator Opens Binance Probe Into Alleged Iran, Russia Violations
description: A senior US senator opened an inquiry into crypto exchange Binance Holdings Ltd. following news reports of its involvement in funneling nearly $2 billion to Iranian government groups designated as terrorist organizations and helping to evade US sanctions on Russian oil.
content: A senior US senator opened an inquiry into crypto exchange Binance Holdings Ltd. following news reports of its involvement in funneling nearly $2 billion to Iranian government groups designated as terrorist organizations and helping to evade US sanctions on Russian oil.
